comment:
I filled out the form to schedule a meeting for a property analysis. It was scheduled for today at 10am via Microsoft Teams. I took a day off work for this. After waiting ten minutes I called and was told the person I’m supposed to meet with was on another call.

That’s so incredibly disrespectful and wasting my time. If it’s this hard to get a meeting with someone at your company then you’re not someone I would do business with. Look elsewhere.
draft_response: Bryan, we are genuinely concerned to read this. Every client's experience matters to us, and we want to understand what happened. Please call us directly at (817) 995-0324 so we can discuss this and find a path forward.
